title: Caregiver Satisfaction with Immunization Services Questionnaire

A.title: Satisfaction with Reception / Registration
items: You were given adequate information on arrival

B.title: Satisfaction with Immunization Services
items: You were informed about the vaccines given
You were told about next appointment / return date

C.title: Satisfaction with Staff Attitude
items: Staff communicated clearly in language you understood
Staff showed concern for your child

D.title: Satisfaction with Physical Environment
items: The facility was clean and tidy
The facility felt safe for your child

E.title: Overall Satisfaction and Intention to Return
items: Overall, I am satisfied with immunization services at this facility
I would recommend this facility to others
I intend to return to this facility for subsequent immunizations
I received value for my time at this facility
